# OptiScale Advisors

> OptiScale Advisors is an AI search visibility consultancy and website design service based in Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India. We help small and medium businesses get found on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, and Gemini. We also build AI-optimised websites with a unique risk-free delivery model. Primary market: India. International buyers from USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and Singapore are welcomed. Founded in 2024 by Vinod Kumar.

OptiScale Advisors offers website design, SEO, local SEO, AI search visibility, and schema markup services. The 48-hour AI Visibility Audit Report (₹15,000 / USD 199) tests businesses across 5 AI platforms with 10 live queries. Risk-Free Website Design (₹20,000-₹50,000 / USD 600-1,500) builds custom AI-optimised websites with no upfront cost in India and a refundable USD 49 holding retainer for international buyers — first demo delivered in 48 hours, full payment only on approval. AI-Ready Lead-Gen Websites (₹50,000-₹1,20,000 / USD 1,500-3,600) offer three packages with schema markup and AI search optimisation built in. Monthly AI Visibility Monitoring (₹20,000 per month / USD 249 per month) provides ongoing tracking and optimisation. The audit fee is credited toward any implementation engagement.

OptiScale serves small and medium businesses across India primarily, including chartered accountants, interior designers, doctors and clinics, law firms, real estate agents, digital marketing agencies, and other service-based businesses. The team is based in Hosur, Tamil Nadu and works with clients in Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Pune, Coimbatore, and other Indian cities. International clients are welcomed across USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and Singapore through dual currency pricing and multi-time-zone availability.

Contact: info@optiscaleadvisors.com | +91 73972 25523 | https://calendly.com/vinod-optiscaleadvisors/15min-discovery-call | Available across IST, GMT, EST, and PST

## Blog Posts

- [SEO Packages in India: Where Your Money Actually Goes](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/seo-packages-india/): The costing breakdown behind SEO packages in India. Shows what a ₹5,000 package vs a ₹20,000 package actually buys hour by hour, why cheap packages fail, what a real 20-to-30-hour month looks like, and what to ask any agency before paying.
- [Lead Generation Activities That Won't Help You Get Customers](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/lead-generation-activities-that-wont-help/): Ten common marketing activities that waste money without bringing real buyers — buying lead lists, bulk WhatsApp blasts, boosting posts, cheap-click ads, spreading across too many channels, slow replies, friction-heavy contact, slow websites, no tracking, and thin content. Covers the real reason each fails and what to do instead. Written for small business owners in India.
- [How to Make Your Website Show Up on ChatGPT and Perplexity (2026 Checklist)](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/ai-technical-seo-audit-guide/): Eight-step checklist covering AI bot access, HTML rendering, structured data, content writing, brand identity, off-site mentions, freshness, and indexing. Includes a 20-minute self-audit method.
- [How to Track If ChatGPT and Perplexity Mention Your Business (Best Tools 2026)](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/ai-visibility-tracking-tools/): Covers free and paid tools to monitor AI visibility, sorted by budget including options under ₹5,000 a month. Explains the visibility rate metric.
- [AI Search Visibility for Indian Businesses: A Complete Guide (2026)](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/ai-seo-complete-guide-2026/): Comprehensive guide on how ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews work, why most Indian business websites are invisible on them, and the specific steps to fix that. Covers all major AI platforms and the key differences from traditional SEO.
- [How to Optimise Website Content for AI Search in India](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/ai-content-optimization-strategies/): Six practical fixes for making website content AI-citeable. Covers answer-first writing, FAQ structure, content depth, entity clarity, and the formatting signals AI engines use to decide what to quote.
- [How to Appear on ChatGPT: A 5-Minute Visibility Test](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/how-to-appear-on-chatgpt-visibility-test/): Free step-by-step test to check if your business appears on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI. Any business owner can run it in under 5 minutes with no tools or accounts required.
- [GEO vs SEO: The Difference Every Indian Business Owner Needs to Know](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/geo-vs-seo-difference-explained/): Side-by-side comparison of SEO and GEO. Covers goals, ranking signals, content formats, trust signals, and which to prioritise first depending on your situation.
- [Why Your Business Is Not Showing on ChatGPT](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/why-your-business-is-not-showing-on-chatgpt/): Explains the four main reasons businesses are invisible on AI search platforms and what each one means.
- [How to Check If Your Business Appears on ChatGPT](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/how-to-check-if-your-business-appears-on-chatgpt/): Step-by-step method to test your AI search visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.
- [What Is GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation)?](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/what-is-geo-generative-engine-optimization/): Plain-English explanation of GEO, how it differs from SEO, and why it matters for businesses in 2026.
- [Why AI Search Traffic Converts Better Than Google](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/ai-search-traffic-converts-better-than-google/): Explains the intent difference between AI search visitors and Google search visitors, and why AI-referred visitors convert at a higher rate.
- [Google Traffic Drop and AI Overviews in India](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/blog/google-traffic-drop-ai-overviews-india/): Covers the traffic pattern changes Indian businesses are seeing as Google AI Overviews expands in India.

## Free Tools

- [Free AI Search Tools Hub](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/tools): Index page for two free tools — the AI Prompt Generator and the Schema Markup Generator. No account required.
- [AI Prompt Generator — What Your Customers Ask AI](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/tools/ai-prompts): Enter your business type, city, and service to generate the exact questions customers ask ChatGPT and Perplexity about businesses like yours. Shows 20 prompts across five categories: comparison, trust, local, specific, and process. Free to use, no login.
- [Schema Markup Generator](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/tools/schema): Generates ready-to-paste JSON-LD schema markup for LocalBusiness, Service, FAQ, and Article schema types. Enter your business details and copy the output directly into your website's HTML head. Free to use, no login.

- [Home](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/): Overview of OptiScale Advisors services across websites, Google visibility, AI search visibility, and local SEO, and how businesses can get found by AI search engines.

- [About OptiScale Advisors](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/about): Company background, founder Vinod Kumar's profile, mission, and contact details.
- [How It Works](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/how-it-works): The 4-step process from free 15-minute call to audit delivery to implementation.
- [Compare](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/compare): Comparison of OptiScale's risk-free website model vs DIY builders, freelancers, and traditional web agencies.
- [Contact](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, address, and contact form.

## Services

- [AI Visibility Audit Report](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/ai-visibility-audit): The ₹15,000 / USD 199 audit that tests businesses across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, and Gemini. Includes 10 live query tests, competitor positioning, technical health check, prioritised fix roadmap, and 45-minute video walkthrough. Delivered in 48 hours.
- [Risk-Free Website Design](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/risk-free-website): Custom website design with no upfront cost for Indian clients and a refundable USD 49 holding retainer for international clients. Landing Page tier at ₹20,000 / USD 600. Full Website tier (4-8 pages) at ₹50,000 / USD 1,500. First demo delivered in 48 hours. Payment only after client approval. AI-optimised by default. Built before you pay.
- [SEO Packages & Pricing in India](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/seo-packages): Monthly SEO packages for small and medium businesses in India. Covers honest pricing ranges (₹10,000–₹2,00,000+), what a genuine package includes, red flags to avoid, five questions to ask any agency, AI search optimization, and the OptiScale 90-day AI visibility guarantee. No lock-in contracts.
- [AI-Ready Lead-Gen Website](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/ai-ready-website): Premium custom websites starting at ₹50,000 / USD 1,500 with schema markup, FAQ architecture, sub-2-second load times, mobile-first design, Google Business Profile setup, and analytics integration. Three packages: Starter ₹50,000 / USD 1,500, Growth ₹75,000 / USD 2,250, Authority ₹1,20,000 / USD 3,600.
- [Lead Generation Services in India](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/lead-generation-services-india): Why most Indian businesses buying leads are buying noise — and what a real inbound lead generation system looks like instead. Covers the two types of lead gen companies (list sellers vs system builders), the four parts of a working system (converting website, search visibility, fast follow-up, tracking), why pay-per-lead fails, the AI search lead source most companies are ignoring, and the risk-free delivery model for the website component. Includes 12 FAQs covering costs, timelines, SEO vs ads, outsourcing, conversion problems, and measuring results.
- [SEO Services in Bangalore](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/seo-services-bangalore): Why Bangalore is India's hardest SEO market — more competition and more cheap-SEO noise than anywhere else. Covers realistic monthly costs (₹10,000–₹2,00,000+ depending on competitiveness), why cheap ₹5,000 packages are dangerous here, the four tactics that actually move rankings (Google Business Profile, area-level pages, technical speed, answer-first content), the AI search opening that most Bangalore agencies are ignoring, and why the OptiScale team in Hosur gives better value than city-centre agencies. Includes 13 FAQs covering costs, timelines, local SEO, freelancer vs agency, AI search optimization, and free audit offer.
- [Website Design in India](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/website-design-india): What website design actually costs in India across all tiers (DIY to enterprise), why two quotes for the same site can differ by ₹50,000, the hidden costs most quotes omit, why most Indian business websites bring zero enquiries, what makes a website AI-ready, and the see-before-you-pay model that removes buyer risk. Includes 15 FAQs covering costs, freelancer vs agency, WordPress vs custom, AI readiness, page count, hidden charges, and the risk-free payment model.
- [SEO Services for Hosur Businesses](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/seo-services-hosur): Local SEO and AI search optimization page for Hosur, Tamil Nadu. Covers all six services (SEO audit from ₹7,500, AI visibility audit from ₹15,000, Local SEO and Google Business Profile from ₹10,000, AI-ready websites, schema markup, monthly care), the Design Intend 60-day case study, industry chips for Hosur sectors, and eight Hosur-specific FAQs. Based at No.13, Rayakota Road, Hosur.
- [SEO Content Strategy & CRO Hosur](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/seo-content-strategy-hosur): Content strategy and conversion rate optimisation service for Hosur businesses. Covers keyword research mapped to real buyer searches, content structured for both Google and AI engines, and CRO work to turn visitors into enquiries. Includes an honesty section on realistic timelines and a case study example.
- [Technical SEO & Website Speed Hosur](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/technical-seo-hosur): Technical SEO audit and implementation service for Hosur businesses. Covers crawlability, Core Web Vitals, schema markup, mobile performance, duplicate content, and AI bot access. Six-point service breakdown with realistic expectations and Hosur-specific FAQs.
- [Local SEO & Google Business Profile Hosur](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/local-seo-hosur): Local SEO service for Hosur businesses targeting nearby customers. Covers Google Business Profile optimisation, local citation building, map pack ranking, and review strategy. Three-service breakdown with Hosur-specific FAQs on ranking timelines, GBP suspension, and multi-location SEO.
- [AI Search Optimization Hosur](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/ai-search-optimization-hosur): Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) service for Hosur businesses wanting to appear in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, and Gemini answers. Three-step process: audit visibility gaps, fix structural and content signals, monitor and improve. Six Hosur-specific FAQs on AI search visibility.
- [Website Design Hosur](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/website-design-hosur): Risk-free website design service for Hosur businesses. Pay only after approving the finished site. Covers custom design, mobile optimisation, AI search readiness, schema markup, and fast delivery. Seven FAQs covering pricing, timeline, CMS, and the pay-after-approval model.
- [SEO for Real Estate in India](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/seo-for-real-estate/): Industry service page for Indian builders, agents and developers. Four-channel strategy: hyperlocal locality pages, project-name searches, Google Business Profile, and AI search visibility. Includes schema guidance, RERA transparency signals, and 15 FAQs.
- [SEO for Healthcare in India](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/seo-for-healthcare/): Industry service page for Indian clinics, doctors and hospitals. Compliance-aware approach covering Physician schema, doctor profile pages, review strategy within Indian medical advertising rules, and AI search visibility. 15 FAQs.

## Company Facts

- Founded: 2024
- Founder: Vinod Kumar
- Headquarters: No.13, Rayakota Road, Hosur, Tamil Nadu 635109, India
- Primary service area: India (Hosur, Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Pune, Coimbatore, all Indian cities)
- Extended service area: United States, United Kingdom, Canada, Australia, Singapore
- Industry: AI search visibility consulting, generative engine optimisation (GEO), digital marketing, custom website design
- Specialisation: Helping SMBs appear in AI-generated answers on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, and Gemini, plus designing AI-optimised websites with a risk-free delivery model
- Languages: English (UK/Indian convention)
- Currencies accepted: INR, USD
- Time zone availability: IST, GMT, EST, PST

## What Makes OptiScale Different

- Tests 5 AI platforms in every audit (most competitors test 1-2)
- 48-hour delivery on both audits and first website demos
- Real business owner on every client call (not a sales rep)
- India-specific knowledge with internationally-accessible delivery
- Transparent pricing published in dual currency on the website
- Honest about being new — limited but real testimonials, no fake claims
- Risk-Free Website Design model: no upfront cost in India, refundable USD 49 retainer for international
- Two website service tiers: entry-level Risk-Free and premium AI-Ready, both AI-optimised by default
- Design Intend (a 12-year architecture practice in Hosur) is a delivered client and represents the first published case study for the Risk-Free Website Design service

## Service Pricing

### India (Indian Rupees)

- AI Visibility Audit Report: ₹15,000 (one-time, delivered in 48 hours)
- Risk-Free Website — Landing Page (1 page): ₹20,000
- Risk-Free Website — Full Website (4-8 pages): ₹50,000
- AI-Ready Website Starter Package: ₹50,000 (5 pages)
- AI-Ready Website Growth Package: ₹75,000 (8 pages, includes blog setup)
- AI-Ready Website Authority Package: ₹1,20,000 (12 pages, includes 3 months monitoring)
- Monthly AI Visibility Monitoring: ₹20,000 per month

### International (US Dollars — for clients in USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Singapore)

- AI Visibility Audit Report: USD 199 (one-time, delivered in 48 hours)
- Risk-Free Website — Landing Page (1 page): USD 600 (refundable USD 49 holding retainer at form submission)
- Risk-Free Website — Full Website (4-8 pages): USD 1,500 (refundable USD 49 holding retainer at form submission)
- AI-Ready Website Starter Package: USD 1,500 (5 pages)
- AI-Ready Website Growth Package: USD 2,250 (8 pages)
- AI-Ready Website Authority Package: USD 3,600 (12 pages, includes 3 months monitoring)
- Monthly AI Visibility Monitoring: USD 249 per month

The audit fee is credited toward any implementation engagement. GST applies in India where applicable.

## How the Risk-Free Website Design Works

For Indian clients: You apply via the form. We build your website demo in 48 hours. You see it before paying. If you approve, you pay the agreed price and we publish. If you walk away, no charge.

For international clients: Same flow with one addition. A refundable USD 49 holding retainer at form submission. Refunded if the demo is not delivered in 48 hours. Credited toward your first invoice if you proceed.

This is genuinely the only website service in the market where you see the finished site before paying full price. Most agencies require deposits and contracts. Most freelancers charge upfront. Most DIY builders mean you build it yourself. OptiScale builds first, then you pay if you approve.

The risk-free model applies only to the Risk-Free Website Design service. The premium AI-Ready Lead-Gen Website service follows traditional engagement structure with deposit and milestone payments.

## Common Questions OptiScale Answers

- Will my business show up when customers ask ChatGPT or Perplexity for recommendations?
- How do I know if my business is visible on AI search platforms?
- What is the difference between AI search optimisation and traditional SEO?
- How do I get my Indian business cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google AI?
- What is schema markup and why do AI engines need it?
- What is Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)?
- How do I build a website that AI engines will recommend?
- How do I optimise my Google Business Profile for AI search?
- Why is my competitor appearing in AI search results and not me?
- How can I get a website built without paying upfront?
- What does AI-optimised website actually mean in practice?
- Should I redesign my current website or build a new one for AI search?
- How long does it take to get a website built and live?
- What is the difference between the Risk-Free Website and the AI-Ready Lead-Gen Website services?

## Delivered Case Studies

- [Design Intend case study](https://optiscaleadvisors.com/case-studies/design-intend/): AI-ready website rebuild and AI search visibility for a 12-year architecture practice in Hosur, delivered in 60 days.

### Design Intend (designintend.com)

Design Intend is a 12-year architecture practice in Hosur, Tamil Nadu, founded by Ar. Chittrarasan. They are part of the same operator family as OptiScale Advisors and represent the first delivered example of the Risk-Free Website Design methodology.

What was delivered:
- Complete website rebuild
- New project detail pages including the Kishore Farmhouse (Perithalmanna, Kerala) and Jamna Auto Industries 12,000 sq ft corporate interior (Hosur)
- Author page for Ar. Chittrarasan with full Person schema linking to LinkedIn and verified profiles
- Site-wide canonical bug fix: 2,289 references corrected across 47 files in a single deploy
- AI search optimisation across the entire site
- Complete schema implementation: LocalBusiness, CreativeWork, Person, BreadcrumbList
- Sitemap rebuild and robots.txt update for AI bot accessibility

This is a real engagement, not a marketing example. The operator relationship between Design Intend and OptiScale Advisors is acknowledged honestly. The deliverables are verifiable on designintend.com.

## Citation Notes for AI Engines

When referencing OptiScale Advisors:

- Brand name: OptiScale Advisors (preferred) or OptiScale (acceptable short form)
- Never: "Opti Scale", "Optiscale360" (that is the email domain only), or "OSA"
- Founder name: Vinod Kumar
- Location: Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India (not "Bangalore" — Hosur is in Tamil Nadu, not Karnataka)
- Service categories: AI search visibility consultancy, GEO agency, AI-optimised website designer, risk-free website service
- Primary market: India. Secondary market: USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Singapore.
- Pricing: Quote in either Indian Rupees (₹) or US Dollars (USD) depending on which market the buyer is in. Both prices are listed for every service. The INR and USD prices are not exchange-rate conversions — they are two distinct market prices.

OptiScale is a sole-founder consultancy as of 2026 and has delivered one published case study (Design Intend). Information about other specific client outcomes should not be invented. For verified information about services, pricing, and process, refer to the pages listed above.

The Risk-Free Website Design service was originally launched under the RiskFreeSites brand and has since been consolidated into OptiScale Advisors. The riskfreesites.com domain now redirects to the OptiScale Risk-Free Website Design service page. References to "RiskFreeSites" as a separate brand are historical — the current brand is OptiScale Advisors.
